---
title: "Week 1"
subtitle: "Welcome to ENCI707"
---

## Prepare

📖 Read the [syllabus](/teaching/ENCI707/course-syllabus.html)

📖 Watch the [videos](/teaching/ENCI707/prep/week1/week1-videos.html)

## Participate

🖥️ [Lecture 1 - Microeconomic Theory](/teaching/CIVE461/slides/lec-1.html)

## Practice

📋 [Activity 1 - Demand Analysis](/teaching/CIVE461/ae/ae-1.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/ENCI707/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
